assertions.assertion: A consent page model injects IIdentityServerInteractionService and calls GetAuthorizationContextAsync to get client and scope details
assertions.rationale: ConsentModel injects IIdentityServerInteractionService and OnGet calls GetAuthorizationContextAsync(returnUrl).

assertions.assertion: The consent page calls GrantConsentAsync with a ConsentResponse that includes ScopesValuesConsented and RememberConsent = true
assertions.rationale: OnPost calls GrantConsentAsync with ScopesValuesConsented but does NOT include RememberConsent = true in the ConsentResponse.

assertions.assertion: The consent page calls DenyAuthorizationAsync with AuthorizationError.AccessDenied when the user denies consent
assertions.rationale: The deny path calls GrantConsentAsync with ConsentResponse { Error = AuthorizationError.AccessDenied } instead of DenyAuthorizationAsync. This is the wrong API.

assertions.assertion: The consent page validates returnUrl using IsValidReturnUrl or checks that GetAuthorizationContextAsync returns non-null before redirecting
assertions.rationale: The page checks if GetAuthorizationContextAsync returns null before proceeding, which validates the returnUrl.
